title: ACP support for external coding CLIs
description: Add an ACP-based integration layer so ion can drive external coding agents like Claude Code, Gemini CLI, and potentially Codex using user subscriptions and provider-native ToS-compliant transports instead of direct model API calls. Design should cover session mapping, streaming/events, tool approvals, cwd/sandbox semantics, and fallback adapters where ACP support differs by client.
